option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# GitHub Copilot – Project Instructions
Before generating any code, read and follow the rules in these two files:
- **[`CODING_STANDARDS.md`](../CODING_STANDARDS.md)** — all coding rules (const correctness, control flow, FreeRTOS guards, casts, magic-number comments). - **[`HARDWARE_NOTES.md`](../HARDWARE_NOTES.md)** — target MCU, robot platform, motor specs, PWM configuration.

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
